name: Green Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pint of whole tomatoes, crushed (including juice), or equal portions of red ripe tomatoes, orange tomatoes, and green tomatoes, peeled and chopped
1 lb lean pork, cubed into 3/4-inch pieces
1-2 cups diced green chili peppers (jalapeños or Anaheim)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep heavy pot, brown the pork cubes on medium-high heat until cooked through but not crusty.
2. Add the garlic salt and crushed garlic while browning.
3. Add the flour to absorb any juices and mix well. Continue cooking for about 2 minutes.
4. Add the green chili peppers and continue cooking for another 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the crushed tomatoes and stir well.
6. Add enough water to make a thin gravy-like sauce. Stir to combine.
7. Bring the mixture to simmering temperature and simmer for approximately half an hour.
8. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
